testcase.name: test_list_transactions

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 24+ transactions, got 20 assert 20 >= 24 + where 20 = len([{'account_code': '5030', 'account_name': 'Utilities', 'amount': 1200.0, 'category': 'Utilities', ...}, {'account_code': '5020', 'account_name': 'Rent Expense', 'amount': 50000.0, 'category': 'Rent Expense', ...}, {'account_code': '5010', 'account_name': 'Salary Expense', 'amount': 250000.0, 'category': 'Salary Expense', ...}, {'account_code': '4010', 'account_name': 'Sales Revenue', 'amount': 180000.0, 'category': 'Sales Revenue', ...}, {'account_code': '5060', 'account_name': 'GST/Tax Expense', 'amount': 52000.0, 'category': 'GST/Tax Payment', ...}, {'account_code': '4030', 'account_name': 'Other Income', 'amount': 5000.0, 'category': 'Other Income', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_api.py:83: in test_list_transactions assert len(items) >= 24, f"Expected 24+ transactions, got {len(items)}" E AssertionError: Expected 24+ transactions, got 20 E assert 20 >= 24 E + where 20 = len([{'account_code': '5030', 'account_name': 'Utilities', 'amount': 1200.0, 'category': 'Utilities', ...}, {'account_code': '5020', 'account_name': 'Rent Expense', 'amount': 50000.0, 'category': 'Rent Expense', ...}, {'account_code': '5010', 'account_name': 'Salary Expense', 'amount': 250000.0, 'category': 'Salary Expense', ...}, {'account_code': '4010', 'account_name': 'Sales Revenue', 'amount': 180000.0, 'category': 'Sales Revenue', ...}, {'account_code': '5060', 'account_name': 'GST/Tax Expense', 'amount': 52000.0, 'category': 'GST/Tax Payment', ...}, {'account_code': '4030', 'account_name': 'Other Income', 'amount': 5000.0, 'category': 'Other Income', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_ai_classify
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_api.py:88: in test_ai_classify assert resp.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 404 in [200, 201] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_transaction
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_api.py:99: in test_create_transaction assert resp.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 405 in [200, 201] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_list_bank_transactions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_api.py:173: in test_list_bank_transactions assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_accounting_api.py:217: in test_chart_of_accounts assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
